# ZYR0 - Internship Management Platform

ZYR0 is a modern, production-grade Internship & Workforce Readiness Platform.
It bridges the gap between academic learning and industry experience by enabling organizations to manage project-based internships, assigning real-world tasks, reviewing code submissions on GitHub, and issuing blockchain-verified digital certificates.

## Core Audience
- **Students**: Apply for internships, work on real-world tasks, submit GitHub repositories, and earn digital certificates.
- **Companies**: Create internships, review applications, assign tasks, review code submissions, and issue certificates.
- **Mentors**: Provide guidance, review submissions, and evaluate intern performance.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, Framer Motion
- **Backend / Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL), Edge Functions (Deno)
- **Deployment**: https://zyroo.dpdns.org

## Key Architectural Principles
- **GitHub First**: Student code is never hosted on ZYR0; students submit GitHub repository URLs to simulate real software engineering workflows.
- **No LMS Features**: ZYR0 focuses on real-world internships. It is not an online course platform.
- **Role-Based Access**: Specialized dashboards and views for Students, Mentors, Companies, and Admins.
- **Verified Credentials**: Certificates are generated securely on the backend with a unique SHA-256 blockchain-style hash to ensure authenticity.

## URLs
- **Production URL**: https://zyroo.dpdns.org
- **Search**: https://zyroo.dpdns.org/internships?search={query}
- **Verify Certificates**: https://zyroo.dpdns.org/verify

## Contact & Support
- Email: support@zyroo.dpdns.org
- Twitter: @zyr0platform
